name: cp-leaderboard
description: CP Leaderboard - Competitive Programming Rating Tracker

scripts.dev: pnpm --filter cp-leaderboard-backend dev & pnpm --filter frontend dev
scripts.build: pnpm --filter frontend build && pnpm --filter cp-leaderboard-backend build
scripts.build:prod: pnpm install --frozen-lockfile && pnpm --filter frontend build && mkdir -p backend/public && cp -r frontend/dist/* backend/public/
scripts.test: pnpm --filter cp-leaderboard-backend test && pnpm --filter frontend test
scripts.test:watch: pnpm --filter cp-leaderboard-backend test:watch & pnpm --filter frontend test:watch
scripts.test:coverage: pnpm --filter cp-leaderboard-backend test:coverage && pnpm --filter frontend test:coverage
